MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Stevenson Street Partners, is present. Represented by Albert Joshua
Attorney, Andrew Catterall, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Gary Young, is present.
Attorney, James Driscoll, representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Judge Karnow, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
